## edu-cli phase-plan add-chapter

Add a chapter to a phase plan (为阶段性计划添加章节)

```
edu-cli phase-plan add-chapter [flags]
```

### Options

```
      --chapter-id uint      Chapter ID (required)
  -h, --help                 help for add-chapter
      --phase-plan-id uint   Phase plan ID (required)
```
